steps.title: Apply the margin of error
steps.content:
A margin of error of $0.05$ means subtracting and adding $0.05$ to the estimate $0.62$.
$$0.62-0.05=0.57$$
$$0.62+0.05=0.67$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: The plausible interval is from $0.57$ to $0.67$. Values below $0.57$ or above $0.67$ are outside that interval, and the estimate does not prove the exact population proportion. The answer is A.
